title: setSyntaxProperty()
text: setSyntaxProperty() Retrieves the value of the specified syntax property for a field. FieldObject . setSyntaxProperty ( SyntaxProperty ) Arguments SyntaxProperty Name of a supported field syntax property. Exceptions The following exceptions may be thrown: uniface.InvalidSyntaxPropertyException uniface.InvalidDataObjectException Description The initial values of a DSP field's widget properties can be set in the Define (Component) Field Properties dialog, or they can be set in Proc using $fieldsyntax . The can be retrieved in JavaScript using the getDeclarativeSyntax function. Once the DSP is loaded, the values of these properties can be dynamically changed in the browser using the setSyntaxProperty and setSyntaxProperties API functions. You can use the clearSyntaxProperties function to reset the field's syntax properties to their initial values. Table 1. Syntax Properties Supported by the JavaScript API Property JavaScript Data Type Values Description/Remarks NED Unsupported. Use property html:readOnly instead — No edit allowed in this field. DIM Unsupported. Use property html:disabled instead — Dim field. No edit and no prompt. REX string Uniface entry format as regex string Regex string for data entry. For example, "/[a-z]*/i" (zero or more [a-zA-Z]). For more information, see Field Syntax Codes . ENT string Uniface entry format as syntax string Syntax for data entry. For example, "&*" (zero or more [a-zA-Z]). For more information, see Field Syntax Codes . LEN object { min: Number , max: Number } Length of field or subfield. ASC boolean ASCII, in Unicode range 00-7F BRM boolean Check that brackets match. DIG boolean Digits only (0-9) DLS boolean Delete leading spaces. DLZ boolean Delete leading zeros. LOW boolean All lowercase MAN boolean Mandatory field (minimum length of one). NUM boolean Numbers only (0-9, . + -) RCS boolean Replace contiguous spaces with one space. UPC boolean All uppercase Example: setSyntaxProperty usage The ​following example sets the length of fieldx to a minimum of 10 and a maximum of 20: Explain this code fieldx.setSyntaxProperty("LEN", {min:10, max:20}) Copy Related Links uniface.InvalidSyntaxPropertyException Exception thrown if the name of the syntax property specified as a parameter is invalid. uniface.InvalidDataObjectException Exception thrown if the object on which the function is called is no longer valid. Field Syntax Codes Field syntax codes specify the data entry pattern, the allowed characters, and whether fields are mandatory or read-only. getSyntaxProperty() Retrieves the value of the specified syntax property for a field. clearSyntaxProperty() Restores the initial value of the specified syntax property. setSyntaxProperties() Sets multiple syntax properties for a field. $fieldsyntax ProcScript function to change the Field Syntax property of a field. uniface.Field The uniface.Field object provides access to selected properties of the field that it represents. It is returned by the getField function of uniface.Occurrence. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
